task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into Rocket.Chat using the provided credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat main dashboard or home screen is visible, indicating the user 'admin' is logged in.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the Administration workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat Administration panel or workspace is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Layout and Login configuration settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Settings' menu is open, specifically showing the 'Layout' or 'Login' configuration section.

task_completion.description: Verify the login layout Title is set to 'Restricted Communication System'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The input field for the Login Form Title contains the exact text 'Restricted Communication System'.

task_completion.description: Verify the login layout Description is set to 'Access is limited to authorized personnel. Usage is monitored.'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The input field or text area for the Login Form Description contains the exact text 'Access is limited to authorized personnel. Usage is monitored.'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser to interact with Rocket.Chat.
integrity.visual_evidence: The actions are performed within a web browser displaying the Rocket.Chat web interface.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands or API scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open showing curl commands, mongo database queries, or python scripts being executed to change the settings.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is interacting with the actual Rocket.Chat settings page.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text is entered into the actual Rocket.Chat input fields, not just typed into a text editor or a mock file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Title: 'Restricted Communication System'. Expected Description: 'Access is limited to authorized personnel. Usage is monitored.'
